nodes.body:
{!header} June was an exciting month for game developers! One of the most significant events is the [Steam Next Fest](https://store.steampowered.com/sale/nextfest), where developers release playable demos, gather valuable player feedback, and build excitement ahead of their games' launches. There were also some major game jams, like the [The Very Serious Juniper Dev Game Jam](https://itch.io/jam/theveryseriousjuniperdevgamejam), the [NES Jam](https://itch.io/jam/nes-jam-2026), the [Game Poems Jam](https://itch.io/jam/multiplatform-2026), and the [Manifesto Jam](https://itch.io/jam/manifesto-jam-2026)! 
We also had a Miniature Paint Night, starring our yellow gamelien, Terrence! [Check out the pictures on instagram](https://www.instagram.com/stlgamedev/p/DZpk2eQEQiT/)!

{ 🧑‍💻 Dev Updates } _Tony Wojnar_ finished creating the [Crayon Canyon](https://bsky.app/profile/tonywojnar.bsky.social/post/3mnmkc457tk2z) level for Dribble 2 and is now working on a [static-themed level](https://bsky.app/profile/tonywojnar.bsky.social/post/3moq2qsamh22i)!

{ 🧑‍💻 Dev Updates } _Eternal Delta Games_ put up a demo of their game, [Yacht Sea: Island Casino](https://store.steampowered.com/app/4831180/Yacht_Sea_Island_Casino_Demo/) for Steam Next Fest! A non-idle clicker dice game about getting rich the honest way: brazen cheating and lucky rolls. Bribe the dealer, rig the table, chase bigger payouts, and cool it down before the casino catches on.

{ 🧑‍💻 Dev Updates } _Dustin Triplett_ has been working on a [typing game in godot](https://bsky.app/profile/dustintriplett.bsky.social/post/3mnxlbfll6s2x). What if there was a Typing of the Dead spinoff, but for destroying your personal demons holding you back?
{ 🧑‍💻 Dev Updates } _Goofy Gourd Studios_ has been working on a [dialogue system to play mid-battle](https://bsky.app/profile/goofygourds.bsky.social/post/3mojro4q4p22j)!

{ 📰 News } _Butterscotch Shenanigans'_ [How Many Dudes?](https://store.steampowered.com/app/3934270) was nominated for [Best Strategic Roguelike for TMG](https://bsky.app/profile/bscotch.net/post/3mog5xs4hss2n)! It's set to release on Steam and mobile July 30th!
{ 🧑‍💻 Dev Updates } _Todd Mitchell_ posted a clip from a [side-scrolling brawler](https://bsky.app/profile/toddnotmitchell.com/post/3mpeexau75k2i ) made in Godot at a hot-topic historical site!

{ 🕹️ Game Jam Releases } _Axol Studio_ released [The Colisino](https://axolstudio.itch.io/the-colisino) for [The Very Serious Juniper Dev Game Jam](https://itch.io/jam/theveryseriousjuniperdevgamejam). Fight your way to Big Wins at the Calisino! Spin to determine your opponents each round!

{ 🎮 Game Releases } _Ryan Swanson_ released [Mini Raid Leader](https://store.steampowered.com/app/4484690/Mini_Raid_Leader/) on Steam! Mini Raid Leader is a single-player Action RTS, in which you command an ever-growing party of heroes to take down powerful bosses.

{ 🧑‍💻 Dev Updates } _CodeInInk_ uploaded a prototype of [Goblin City Planner](https://codeinink.itch.io/goblin-city-planner-prototype)! Connect houses and caves together as you expand the transportation in the depths of a goblin city. Do well and you're entrusted with more of the city; poorly .. well, it's best not to think of that now.

{ 🕹️ Game Jam Releases } _Renhet Studio_ released [Beelze Pub](https://renhetstudio.itch.io/beelze-pub) as part of [Comfy Jam: Summer](https://itch.io/jam/comfy-jam-summer-2026/rate/4682327)! You are Skelly, a laid-back skeletender filling in behind the bar at Beelze Pub for the weekend. Your job is simple: mix drinks, serve customers, and keep the business running until the boss gets back. Everyone arrives with their own problems, questionable life choices, and surprisingly strong opinions about cocktails.

{ 🎼 Music Releases } _Nathan Amiri_ made this cool [song site](https://nathan-amiri.github.io/Monster/) inspired by *My Singing Monsters* where you can hear different combinations of tracks by toggling them on/off.

{ 📅 Events } [STLVGMO](https://stlvgmo.com) (_St. Louis Video Game Music Orchestra_) is playing their third concert on July 11th at Webster Groves High School. _Echoes of Hyrule_ will feature music from the Legend of Zelda franchise.  [Check out their trailer](https://youtu.be/okLd6RQQ4AY)!

{ 📅 Events } [Video Game Music Fest](<https://www.moshmellow.org/event-details/video-game-music-and-breakbeat-jazz>) featuring _3 of 5_, _Boxwood Currents_, _Joystick Drift_, and _The Vibe Exchange_ with representation from STLGameDev, STLVGMO, and Gateway Blerds on Sunday 7/19 at Moshmellow. Admission is just $10!

{ 📅 Events } [**MOGameCon**](<https://www.mogamecon.com/>) is happening once again at Greensfelder Rec Complex in Queeny Park on Saturday 7/25. Come out to check out retro games, arcade games, and visit _STLGameDev_'s table while you're here!  Admission is $10.
{ 🎨 Visual Art } _StarBiscute_ made some amazing [Knights of Guinevere fan art](https://bsky.app/profile/starbiscute.bsky.social/post/3molaasnq6k2q)!

{ 🎨 Visual Art } _Xain Russell_ made some great [Mina the Hollower](https://bsky.app/profile/xainrussell.bsky.social/post/3mn2vunj7mk2o) and [Spyro the Dragon fan art!](https://bsky.app/profile/xainrussell.bsky.social/post/3mnpv6inhys2m)
{ 🎨 Visual Art } Lucia Williams made this fantastic [Amazing Digital Circus cosplay](https://www.instagram.com/reels/DZL3_mSM-cg/)!

events.title: July GameDev Social!
events.description:
Chat with fellow creators about making, playing, and admiring games! Talk about your game ideas and get inspired! Make friends and find collaborators. Our monthly hangout is open to EVERYONE! 
WE ARE MOVING TO A NEW LOCATION THIS MONTH!
 
For full details, including the address, and to RSVP see: https://www.meetup.com/st-louis-game-developers/events/313699544
events.location: Schlafly Bottleworks, 7260 Southwest Ave, St. Louis, MO 63143, USA

events.title: Game Club: Sunless Sea
events.description:
Game Club is like a book club except we pick a game to play each month and then meet up to discuss it with a focus on game design. Our game for this month is Sunless Sea!

For full details, including the address, and to RSVP see: https://www.meetup.com/st-louis-game-developers/events/315376266
events.location: Sauce on the Side, 701 N New Ballas Rd, Creve Coeur, MO 63141, USA

events.title: MOGameCon 2026
events.description:
This is not an official STLGameDev event, but we will have a table there once again. Stop by and say hi if you attend!

General admission tickets for the convention are $10 and will be available at the door. For more information or to purchase tickets online, check out the MOGameCon website.

For full details, including the address, and to RSVP see: https://www.meetup.com/st-louis-game-developers/events/315511103
events.location: Greensfelder Recreation Complex, 550 Weidman Rd, Manchester, MO 63011, USA

events.title: July Game Audio Club - Project Share
events.description:
If you’re into making video game music or sound design (or just curious) come hang out with us once a month! Doesn’t matter if you’re a pro or just starting out— everyone’s welcome. Just bring your love for game audio. Chill time where you can share your work, get feedback, or just vibe with people who love game audio. 
 
For full details, including the address, and to RSVP see: https://www.meetup.com/st-louis-game-developers/events/315446561
events.location: St. Louis County Library - Clark Family Branch, 1640 S Lindbergh Blvd, St. Louis, MO 63131, USA

events.title: July Gamedev Work Night
events.description:
St. Louis County Library Clark Family branch is hosting casual work time for local game developers in the Creative Lab. Bring your project to work on and talk with other devs for feedback or fun. This is open to EVERYONE ages 14 and up. 
 
For full details, including the address, and to RSVP see: https://www.meetup.com/st-louis-game-developers/events/315376282
events.location: St. Louis County Library - Clark Family Branch, 1640 S Lindbergh Blvd, St. Louis, MO 63131, USA

events.title: Game Night at MO History Museum
events.description:
The Missouri History Museum is having a big Game Night featuring games and creators from the St. Louis area (including STLGameDev)! 
 
For full details, including the address, and to RSVP see: https://www.meetup.com/st-louis-game-developers/events/315376686
events.location: Missouri History Museum - 5700 Lindell Blvd. - St. Louis  , MO, us

events.title: August GameDev Social!
events.description:
Chat with fellow creators about making, playing, and admiring games! Talk about your game ideas and get inspired! Make friends and find collaborators. Our monthly hangout is open to EVERYONE! 
WE WILL BE AT A SPECIAL LOCATION THIS MONTH!
 
For full details, including the address, and to RSVP see: https://www.meetup.com/st-louis-game-developers/events/315376730
events.location: BoCo Boba, 500 N Grand Blvd, St. Louis, MO 63103, USA

events.title: Share & Play: Game Playtesting!
events.description:
Join us for casual game playtesting! This is an opportunity for developers to share their progress, observe playtesting, and get feedback on their projects, and for local game enthusiasts to get their hands on new games, prototypes, and give helpful feedback. 
 
For full details, including the address, and to RSVP see: https://www.meetup.com/st-louis-game-developers/events/314944378
events.location: St. Louis County Library - Clark Family branch - 1640 South Lindbergh Blvd - St. Louis, MO, us
